import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; const skills = { "Back-End": ["PHP", "Laravel", "CodeIgniter", "Node.js", "AJAX", "RESTful APIs", "Core PHP"], "Front-End": ["JavaScript", "Angular", "React.js", "HTML5", "CSS3", "Bootstrap", "jQuery", "Ionic"], "Databases": ["MySQL", "MongoDB", "Firebase"], "ERP / Domains": ["Mill Production", "Plantation Mgmt", "Weighbridge", "CRM", "Maintenance Systems"], "Other": ["Three.js", "Babylon.js", "JIRA", "Git/GitHub", "MERN Stack", "Offline-Online Sync"], }; const experience = [ { role: "Project Manager", company: "Airei India Private Limited", period: "Nov 2024 – Present", flag: "🇮🇳", points: [ "Leading a 15-member team delivering multiple projects on schedule.", "20% rise in customer satisfaction, 15% reduction in delivery time.", "10% cut in project costs via JIRA implementation and process optimisation.", ], }, { role: "International Client Manager – PHC Palm Oil ERP", company: "Congo (Remote)", period: "Nov 2024 – Present", flag: "🇨🇬", points: [ "Handling PHC Congo client for a palm oil ERP covering Mill Production, Plantation & Weighbridge modules.", "Collecting and documenting client requirements, coordinating with BA team.", "Overseeing Weighbridge Software with bidirectional offline/online data sync.", "Led Image-to-Text module to digitise handwritten field records.", ], }, { role: "On-site Project Manager – Palm Oil ERP", company: "Malaysia (On-site)", period: "Feb 2025 – Mar 2025", flag: "🇲🇾", points: [ "Deployed on-site for full ERP implementation, go-live, and staff training.", "Managed cross-border coordination between Indian dev team and Malaysian stakeholders.", ], }, { role: "PHP Full Stack Developer", company: "Pamz3d Private India Ltd.", period: "Mar 2016 – Oct 2024", flag: "🇮🇳", points: [ "Built websites, job portals, ERP and CRM systems using PHP, Laravel and MySQL.", "Developed 3D web apps (Three.js, Babylon.js) and hybrid mobile apps (Ionic + Angular).", ], }, { role: "Web Developer", company: "M8it Solutions", period: "Oct 2014 – Mar 2016", flag: "🇮🇳", points: [ "Delivered responsive web designs increasing mobile traffic by 30%.", "Reduced bounce rate by 20% through performance and UX improvements.", ], }, ]; const projects = [ { name: "PHC Palm Oil ERP – Congo", status: "Ongoing", desc: "Large-scale ERP for palm oil conglomerate covering Mill Production, Plantation, Weighbridge with offline/online sync and Image-to-Text digitisation.", stack: ["PHP", "Laravel", "MySQL", "Angular"], icon: "🌴" }, { name: "Palm Oil ERP – Malaysia", status: "Delivered", desc: "On-site ERP go-live for Malaysian palm oil company with full staff training and post-deployment support.", stack: ["PHP", "Laravel", "MySQL"], icon: "🏭" }, { name: "ERP – Project & Employee Management", status: "Delivered", desc: "Project management, employee tracking, time logging and reporting system.", stack: ["Laravel", "JavaScript", "AJAX", "MySQL"], icon: "📊" }, { name: "Grocery Management System", status: "Delivered", desc: "User and admin apps with real-time notifications and order management.", stack: ["Ionic", "Angular", "PHP", "MySQL", "Firebase"], icon: "🛒" }, { name: "Job Portal", status: "Delivered", desc: "Online CV upload, video call interviews, auto scheduling and job alerts.", stack: ["Core PHP", "MySQL"], icon: "💼" }, { name: "Service Provider & Seeker Platform", status: "Delivered", desc: "Registration, real-time mapping, service requests, notifications and ratings.", stack: ["Ionic", "Angular", "PHP", "MySQL", "Firebase"], icon: "📍" }, ]; const navLinks = ["About", "Skills", "Experience", "Projects", "Contact"]; export default function Portfolio() { const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState("About"); const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false); const scrollTo = (id) => { setMenuOpen(false); document.getElementById(id)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }); }; useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 50); window.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); const observer = new IntersectionObserver( (entries) => entries.forEach((e) => { if (e.isIntersecting) setActiveSection(e.target.id); }), { threshold: 0.3 } ); navLinks.forEach((n) => { const el = document.getElementById(n); if (el) observer.observe(el); }); return () => { window.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); observer.disconnect(); }; }, []); return (
{/* NAV */}

"center", gap: 20 }, contactIcon: { width: 48, height: 48, background: "#00e5ff10", border: "1px solid #00e5ff20", borderRadius: 12, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: 24, flexShrink: 0 }, contactLabel: { fontSize: 11, color: "#636c7e", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 1, marginBottom: 2 }, contactVal: { color: "#00e5ff", fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 14, textDecoration: "none" }, footer: { background: "#050810", borderTop: "1px solid #1a2035", padding: "32px 40px", textAlign: "center", color: "#3a4255", fontSize: 13 }, }; const css = ` @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sora:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap'); *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.85); } } @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .nav-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #8892a4; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; transition: all 0.2s; font-weight: 500; } .nav-btn:hover { color: #e8eaf0; background: #ffffff08; } .nav-btn.active { color: #00e5ff; background: #00e5ff10; } .menu-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; color: #e8eaf0; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00e5ff, #0072ff); color: #000; border: none; padding: 13px 28px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 0 24px #00e5ff30; } .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 40px #00e5ff50; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #e8eaf0; border: 1px solid #1a2035; padding: 13px 28px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; } .btn-outline:hover { border-color: #00e5ff; color: #00e5ff; background: #00e5ff08; } .card { background: #0d1117; border: 1px solid #1a2035; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px 24px; transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .card:hover { border-color: #00e5ff35; } .skill-card:hover, .proj-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .tag { background: #141b26; border: 1px solid #1a2035; border-radius: 6px; padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: #8892a4; cursor: default; transition: all 0.2s; } .tag:hover { background: #00e5ff12; border-color: #00e5ff40; color: #00e5ff; } .timeline-item { position: relative; padding-left: 0; } .timeline-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -32px; top: 0; bottom: -24px; width: 1px; background: #1a2035; } .timeline-item:last-child::before { display: none; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav-btn { display: none; } .menu-toggle { display: block !important; } } `;
